new_terms.context: A collective term for AI/HPC accelerators like GPUs, TPUs, and NPUs.
Handset Bill of Materials costs affected by rising memory prices.
General category for chips like Rubin GPUs or TPUs used for AI workloads.
Specific next-generation Google Tensor Processing Unit version.
Refers to the growth in the number of physical smartphone units sold.
The volume of wafers required by specific market segments like smartphones or AI.
